svg.title: End-to-end cloud data engineering pipeline for a gym management analytics system
svg.desc: Seven-stage architecture: local Excel data sources, Python processing, Azure Blob Storage, Dockerized Airflow orchestration, Snowflake data warehouse with raw and analytics layers, Power BI dashboard, and final business insights.

g.text: Missing value handling • data type conversion
Clean CSVs uploaded via Azure Storage SDK
Interactive filters • KPIs • charts • BI reports
